title: pilosella pilipes subsp. acrocoma
intro: Pilosella pilipes subsp. acrocoma is a lesser-known species of flowering plant within the Pilosella genus, which is commonly referred to as a type of burdock or hawkweed. It is known for its potential medicinal properties, with research suggesting that it may have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, Pilosella pilipes subsp. acrocoma is used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
